it:32.2: This was said by the Blessed One, said by the Arahant, so I have heard:
it:32.3: "Endowed with two things, a person — as if carried off — is thus placed in hell. Which two? Evil habits and evil views. Endowed with these two things, a person — as if carried off — is thus placed in hell."
it:32.4:
Evil habits and evil views:
a person, undiscerning, endowed with these two things, at the break-up of the body reappears in hell.
it:32.5: This, too, was the meaning of what was said by the Blessed One, so I have heard.
